ddls:
CREATE TABLE "plants" (
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant */,
  "species" TEXT /* Latin name of the plant species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the plant species */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume or batch number of the plant */,
  "sizeindex" REAL /* Size index of the plant */,
  "xleft" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the left boundary of the plant's location */,
  "ybottom" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the bottom boundary of the plant's location */,
  "xright" INTEGER /* X coordinate of the right boundary of the plant's location */,
  "ytop" INTEGER /* Y coordinate of the top boundary of the plant's location */,
  "plant_type" TEXT /* Type of plant (e.g., tree, shrub, flower) */,
  "planting_date" TEXT /* Date when the plant was planted */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "lifecycle_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the plant's lifecycle */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plants_species FOREIGN KEY ("species") REFERENCES species_info ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species_info" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Latin name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "origin" TEXT /* Geographic origin of the species */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "growth_rate" TEXT /* Average growth rate of the species */,
  "maximum_height" INTEGER /* Maximum height the species can reach */,
  "preferred_soil" TEXT /* Preferred soil type for the species */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the record pertains to */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance activity occurred */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Type of maintenance activity performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the maintenance activity */,
  "next_maintenance_due" TEXT /* Date when the next maintenance is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_maintenance_by FOREIGN KEY ("maintenance_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the research project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the research project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher leading the project */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the research project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Areas of research interest for the researcher */,
  "publications" TEXT /* List of publications by the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_plants" (
  "project_plant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-plant relationship */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant involved in the project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the plant in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_plants_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_plants_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the image is associated with */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_images_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_tags_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spatial_data" (
  "spatial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spatial data record */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant the spatial data pertains to */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil in which the plant is growing */,
  "sunlight_exposure" TEXT /* Level of sunlight exposure the plant receives */,
  "watering_needs" TEXT /* Watering needs of the plant */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the plant's location */,
  "proximity_to_features" TEXT /* Proximity to garden features */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spatial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spatial_data_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "plant_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each plant update */,
  "plant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the plant that was updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the update occurred */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member who made the update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_plant_updates_plant_id FOREIGN KEY ("plant_id") REFERENCES plants ("plant_id")
)
